ddls:
CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the brand of the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was last updated */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "sku" TEXT /* Stock-keeping unit of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "warranty_period" TEXT /* Warranty period of the product */,
  "return_policy" TEXT /* Return policy of the product */,
  "rating_average" REAL /* Average rating of the product based on reviews */,
  "review_count" INTEGER /* Number of reviews for the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_brand_id FOREIGN KEY ("brand_id") REFERENCES brands ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "brands" (
  "brand_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each brand */,
  "brand_name" TEXT /* Name of the brand */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the brand */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the brand */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the brand was founded */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the brand's headquarters */,
  "logo_path" TEXT /* Path to the brand's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("brand_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the review is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who wrote the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the user (1-5) */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the review (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date and time the review was submitted */,
  "is_moderated" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the review has been moderated */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the review has been approved */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "helpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as helpful */,
  "unhelpful_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the review was marked as unhelpful */,
  "review_source" TEXT /* Source of the review (e.g., website, mobile app) */,
  "is_featured" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the review is featured */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Response from the product team */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date and time the response was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., customer, moderator, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the user */,
  "profile_image_path" TEXT /* Path to the user's profile image */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sentiment_analysis" (
  "sentiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sentiment analysis result */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review the sentiment analysis is for */,
  "sentiment_score" REAL /* Sentiment score of the review (e.g., -1 to 1) */,
  "sentiment_label" TEXT /* Sentiment label (e.g., positive, negative, neutral) */,
  "sentiment_details" TEXT /* Detailed sentiment analysis results (e.g., key phrases, entities) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the sentiment analysis */,
  "sentiment_keywords" TEXT /* Key words or phrases that influenced the sentiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sentiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sentiment_analysis_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "moderators" (
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderator */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is a moderator */,
  "moderator_name" TEXT /* Full name of the moderator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the moderator */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the moderator account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the moderator account was last updated */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the moderator */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the moderator */,
  "profile_image_path" TEXT /* Path to the moderator's profile image */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the moderator's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the moderator account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moderators_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "review_moderation" (
  "moderation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each moderation action */,
  "review_id" INTEGER /* ID of the review being moderated */,
  "moderator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the moderator who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken (e.g., approve, reject, flag) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time the action was taken */,
  "action_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the action */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Response from the moderator */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date and time the response was given */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("moderation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_moderation_moderator_id FOREIGN KEY ("moderator_id") REFERENCES moderators ("moderator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_review_moderation_review_id FOREIGN KEY ("review_id") REFERENCES reviews ("review_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who received the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., review_confirmation, product_update) */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was sent */,
  "is_read" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the notification has been read */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the notification (e.g., website, mobile app) */,
  "read_date" TEXT /* Date and time the notification was read */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_variants" (
  "variant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product variant */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the variant belongs to */,
  "variant_name" TEXT /* Name of the variant */,
  "variant_description" TEXT /* Description of the variant */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the variant */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the variant in stock */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the variant was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the variant was last updated */,
  "variant_image_path" TEXT /* Path to the image of the variant */,
  "variant_weight" REAL /* Weight of the variant */,
  "variant_dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the variant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_variants_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product the image belongs to */,
  "image_path" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_description" TEXT /* Description of the image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the image was uploaded */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of the image (e.g., main, thumbnail) */,
  "image_alt_text" TEXT /* Alt text for the image */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_images_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)
